market_description: WPSR U.S. crude stocks ex-SPR change threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WPSR table release for weekly crude stocks ex-SPR.
mispricing_hypothesis: Refinery runs, imports, and weather outages imply delta not reflected in odds.

market_description: WPSR Cushing crude stocks threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WPSR Cushing inventory table value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Pipeline-flow and spread dislocations are slow to update implied odds.
confounders: Operational pipeline moves can dominate fundamentals.

market_description: WPSR gasoline stocks threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WPSR motor gasoline stocks value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Yield + weather demand transmission misprices near-threshold outcomes.

market_description: WPSR distillate stocks threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WPSR distillate stocks value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Heating and freight demand turns can beat consensus pricing.
confounders: Export swings may dominate domestic weather.

market_description: WPSR jet fuel stocks threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WPSR jet fuel inventory value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Travel-weather disruption linkage is underweighted in implied odds.
confounders: Airline schedule shocks are not trend demand.

market_description: WPSR propane/propylene stocks threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WPSR propane and propylene stocks value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Cold/HDD and export pull tighten balances faster than market odds.

market_description: WPSR refinery utilization threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WPSR refinery utilization percent value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Turnarounds and outage risk can move runs beyond priced range.

market_description: WPSR crude inputs to refineries threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WPSR crude inputs to refineries value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Run-rate changes can lead inventory consensus shifts.

market_description: WPSR crude imports threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WPSR crude imports weekly value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Tanker bunching effects are often underpriced pre-release.
confounders: Pure timing noise can dominate signal.

market_description: WPSR gasoline product supplied threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WPSR gasoline product supplied value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Weather and holiday demand swings can be misread in implied odds.
confounders: Product supplied is demand proxy, not direct consumption.

market_description: WNGSR Lower 48 working gas weekly change threshold market
settlement_source: EIA Weekly Natural Gas Storage Report
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WNGSR Lower 48 weekly change value.
mispricing_hypothesis: HDD/CDD, LNG feedgas, and maintenance imply different storage delta.
confounders: Pipeline outages can dominate weather model expectations.

market_description: WNGSR East region working gas change threshold market
settlement_source: EIA Weekly Natural Gas Storage Report
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WNGSR East region storage change value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Northeast weather and basis shocks reach odds with lag.

market_description: WNGSR Midwest region working gas change threshold market
settlement_source: EIA Weekly Natural Gas Storage Report
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WNGSR Midwest region storage change value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Midwest HDD shocks can be underweighted into release.
confounders: Storage field operations and outage events.

market_description: WNGSR South Central region working gas change threshold market
settlement_source: EIA Weekly Natural Gas Storage Report
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WNGSR South Central storage change value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Gulf weather and LNG pull can outpace implied probabilities.

market_description: WNGSR Pacific region working gas change threshold market
settlement_source: EIA Weekly Natural Gas Storage Report
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official WNGSR Pacific region storage change value.
mispricing_hypothesis: West weather and power burn shifts can surprise consensus odds.

market_description: GDFU U.S. regular gasoline retail price threshold market
settlement_source: EIA Gasoline and Diesel Fuel Update
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official Tuesday GDFU U.S. regular gasoline price.
mispricing_hypothesis: Crack spread and local supply pass-through speed misprices threshold odds.

market_description: GDFU U.S. diesel retail price threshold market
settlement_source: EIA Gasoline and Diesel Fuel Update
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official Tuesday GDFU U.S. on-highway diesel price.
mispricing_hypothesis: Freight demand and distillate crack shifts pass through unevenly.

market_description: HOPU U.S. residential heating oil price threshold market
settlement_source: EIA Heating Oil and Propane Update
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official HOPU residential heating-oil price (Oct-Mar season).
mispricing_hypothesis: Cold-shot demand and distillate cracks can move faster than survey expectations.
confounders: Seasonal cadence and one-week revision window.

market_description: HOPU U.S. residential propane price threshold market
settlement_source: EIA Heating Oil and Propane Update
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official HOPU U.S. residential propane price (Oct-Mar season).
mispricing_hypothesis: Storage/export stress can appear in residential prints with lag mispricing.

market_description: HOPU Midwest residential propane price threshold market
settlement_source: EIA Heating Oil and Propane Update
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official HOPU Midwest (PADD 2) residential propane price (Oct-Mar season).
mispricing_hypothesis: Midwest cold shocks and logistics can decouple regional and national pricing.

market_description: CPI all-items month-over-month threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BLS CPI release print timestamped 08:30 ET.
mispricing_hypothesis: Gasoline, airfare, and shelter nowcasts diverge from consensus threshold odds.
confounders: Base effects, seasonal-factor changes, and revisions.

market_description: CPI core month-over-month threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BLS core CPI print at release time.
mispricing_hypothesis: Market overweights headline swings and underweights shelter/services persistence.
confounders: OER lag, used-car swings, medical services noise.
mapping_notes: Mapped from latest broad scan (kalshi_nonsports_scan_20260329_135858_371.csv); yes_bid=0.26, yes_ask=0.28, spread=0.02, hours_to_close=1746.5005.

market_description: CPI all-items year-over-year threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BLS headline CPI YoY value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Monthly pulse is priced but base-effect path is mispriced.
confounders: YoY base effects can move opposite current monthly trend.
mapping_notes: Mapped from latest broad scan (kalshi_nonsports_scan_20260329_135858_371.csv); yes_bid=0.09, yes_ask=0.11, spread=0.02, hours_to_close=1746.5005.

market_description: CPI core year-over-year threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BLS core CPI YoY value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Housing disinflation pace and sticky services are often misweighted.
confounders: Weight drift and revisions to prior month.
mapping_notes: Mapped from latest broad scan (kalshi_nonsports_scan_20260329_135858_371.csv); yes_bid=0.11, yes_ask=0.12, spread=0.01, hours_to_close=2562.5005.

market_description: PPI final demand month-over-month threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BLS PPI final demand MoM value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Commodity/freight pass-through lags are not fully reflected in odds.
confounders: Services trade margins create one-off spikes.

market_description: PPI core month-over-month threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BLS core PPI value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Headline pipeline shocks are misread as core trend.

market_description: Nonfarm payrolls change threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BLS nonfarm payroll change value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Claims, withholding, and weather effects imply threshold odds drift pre-release.
confounders: Birth-death model impact and benchmark revisions.
mapping_notes: Mapped from latest broad scan (kalshi_nonsports_scan_20260329_135858_371.csv); yes_bid=0.33, yes_ask=0.37, spread=0.04, hours_to_close=1626.5005.

market_description: Unemployment rate threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BLS unemployment rate value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Household survey deterioration can be underpriced versus payroll focus.
confounders: Participation swings and household survey variance.
mapping_notes: Mapped from latest broad scan (kalshi_nonsports_scan_20260329_135858_371.csv); yes_bid=0.11, yes_ask=0.18, spread=0.07, hours_to_close=1626.5005.

market_description: Average hourly earnings month-over-month threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BLS AHE MoM value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Composition effects often mistaken for true wage acceleration.
confounders: Bonus timing, hours mix, and sector rotation.

market_description: JOLTS job openings threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BLS JOLTS openings value at 10:00 ET.
mispricing_hypothesis: Vacancy trend inflection reaches market odds late.

market_description: JOLTS quits rate threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BLS JOLTS quits-rate value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Worker-confidence turns can lead payroll data and be underpriced.

market_description: Headline retail sales month-over-month threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official Census advance retail sales MoM print.
mispricing_hypothesis: Gas and auto nominal distortions create threshold mispricing.

market_description: Durable goods orders month-over-month threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official Census durable goods MoM print.
mispricing_hypothesis: Transport/aircraft noise around thresholds is often under-hedged.

market_description: Housing starts SAAR threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official Census housing starts SAAR value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Mortgage-rate and weather effects can move starts more than odds imply.

market_description: Building permits SAAR threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official Census building permits SAAR value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Permit pipeline inflects before starts but is often underweighted.

market_description: New home sales SAAR threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official Census new home sales SAAR value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Builder incentives can shift closings faster than consensus odds.

market_description: Core PCE month-over-month threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BEA core PCE MoM value.
mispricing_hypothesis: CPI-to-PCE mapping is treated too mechanically in market pricing.
confounders: Different BEA weights, residual categories, revisions.

market_description: Personal income month-over-month threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BEA personal income MoM value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Transfer/dividend/farm components are often under-modeled.
confounders: One-off policy transfer or dividend events.

market_description: GDP advance annualized quarter-over-quarter threshold market
source_timestamp_rule: Settle on first official BEA GDP advance QoQ annualized value.
mispricing_hypothesis: Inventory and trade nowcast error creates threshold edge.
confounders: Advance print uses incomplete source data.
mapping_notes: Mapped from latest broad scan (kalshi_nonsports_scan_20260329_135858_371.csv); yes_bid=0.65, yes_ask=0.71, spread=0.06, hours_to_close=2946.5005.
